channel.title: SPCX Watch — Musk-Free Certified
channel.description: Daily-scanned changes in Tesla/SpaceX exposure across 842 funds. Know the moment SPCX lands in yours.

item.title: QQQ: SpaceX detected
item.description: QQQ (Invesco QQQ Trust (Nasdaq-100)) now shows SpaceX at 1.21% — SPCX has entered this fund's visible holdings.

item.title: QQQM: SpaceX detected
item.description: QQQM (Invesco Nasdaq-100 ETF) now shows SpaceX at 1.25% — SPCX has entered this fund's visible holdings.

item.title: ARKQ: exposure shift
item.description: ARKQ (ARK Autonomous Tech & Robotics ETF) Musk exposure moved 16.2% → 16.8%.

item.title: XLY: exposure shift
item.description: XLY (Consumer Discretionary Select Sector SPDR) Musk exposure moved 18.4% → 19.1%.

item.title: TSLS: exposure shift
item.description: TSLS (Direxion Daily TSLA Bear 1X Shares) Musk exposure moved 6.2% → 6.9%.

item.title: XOVR: exposure shift
item.description: XOVR (ERShares Private-Public Crossover ETF) Musk exposure moved 16.6% → 16.0%.
